name: sdk-engineer
description: Repo-local implementation guidance for the Nexus TypeScript SDK.

interface.shortDescription: Implement and maintain the Nexus TypeScript SDK
interface.longDescription: Use SDK Engineer for repo-specific guidance on OpenAPI generation, typed client wrappers, locale filtering, packaging, and test updates in the Nexus SDK.
defaultPrompt: Implement an endpoint wrapper in the Nexus SDK and keep generation and tests in sync
Update locale filtering behavior without breaking the public SDK surface
Regenerate API types and ship the matching dist output for this package
